schema_version: v0 — migrates into the intention envelope when MAP.md Q6 lands
what: Frictionless captures — thoughts from the discussion worth keeping that are not yet tracked nodes.
why: Capture must be near-zero friction or thoughts are lost in the gap between surfacing and acting. A note is a holding pen: non-terminal, un-cast, un-proved, carrying no false weight. It gets picked up by /intent if it grows into work. Written by skill:/note.
owner: the notes store owns writes; the single commons emit chokepoint validates every record against the template below (Law 6).

template.author: who captured it (CC | Akien | …)
template.relates_to: optional — id/address of a node/ticket/artifact it hangs off

notes_on_the_store: A note is NOT a decision, a record of truth, or a proof — if it is one of those, it belongs in decisions/ or a VALIDATION, not here.
Non-terminal by nature: a note may be superseded, promoted to an intention, or dropped.
